name: NI 43-101 Technical Report (PEA) for the Pozuelos-Pastos Grandes Project in Argentina dated 2018.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report (PEA) for the Pozuelos-Pastos Grandes Project in Argentina dated 2018.pdf
document.description: This report provides a Preliminary Economic Assessment (PEA) on the Pozuelos-Pastos Grandes (PPG) Project, including technical information on geology, hydrology, resource estimation, and preliminary mining methods for lithium extraction.
